CustomMetadata.label: GU-007 - Guest profile has Edit on sensitive standard objects

values.value: Guest profile has Edit on sensitive standard objects
The guest profile has Edit permission on Account, Contact, Case, Lead, or Opportunity. Unauthenticated users can modify your core CRM records.
Unauthenticated users can modify your core CRM data, potentially corrupting account records, overwriting contact details, or altering case statuses without any audit trail.
Remove Edit permission on all sensitive objects from the guest profile. Read-only access should be the maximum permission for unauthenticated visitors on any standard CRM object.
